prompt: A realistic candid restaurant photo of a young Japanese woman seated at a wooden sushi counter in a warmly lit traditional Japanese restaurant, centered in the frame and facing the camera. She has long straight black hair with full bangs, and is wearing a soft cream knit off-shoulder sweater with a wide sailor-style collar trimmed in brown, a white buttoned inner collar, long sleeves with flared cuffs, and a feminine modest fashion look. She is holding chopsticks in her right hand above a small blue-and-white soy sauce dish, with her left hand resting on the table. In front of her is a large rectangular ceramic platter with exactly 8 pieces of sushi arranged in a row, including pink tuna, deeper red tuna, orange salmon, two shrimp nigiri, and pale white fish; to the right is a separate rectangular plate with assorted tempura including 2 large shrimp and mixed vegetable tempura. On the left side of the table are a ceramic tea cup with bold black Japanese calligraphy, a wooden chopstick holder packed with disposable chopsticks, and small wrapped items. Behind her is an open sushi bar with exactly 2 visible chefs in white uniforms and hats, glass display cases, handwritten Japanese menu cards, wooden counters, and several seated diners in the background. Shot at eye level with a smartphone-photo feel, natural indoor perspective, documentary realism, rich wood textures, warm amber lighting, detailed food realism, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, authentic busy dinner atmosphere, no stylization, no illustration, photorealistic.
